case_title: GLASS, CYNTHIA DBA HEAVENLY MAIDS VS PRICE, SCOTT DBA SF WEEKLY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GLASS, CYNTHIA DBA HEAVENLY MAIDS AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, SCOTT DBA SF WEEKLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLASS, CYNTHIA DBA HEAVENLY MAIDS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRICE, SCOTT DBA SF WEEKLY DEFT WAIVED ANY & ALL IRREGULARITIES IN THE NAMING OF THE DEFT. SFWKLY VOLUNTARILY SUBMIT TO CT JURIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-13-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF DEC-06-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PLTF FILED DECL: DEF. NOT SRVD.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, SCOTT DBA SF WEEKLY
